text.title: Playwright Testing Patterns
text.summary: Test structure, fixtures, assertion patterns, Page Object Model, and advanced browser handling.

section.title: Test Structure
section.p: Use @playwright/test runner: test.describe for grouping, test.beforeEach for navigation, test for individual behaviors.
One assertion per behavior. Soft assertions (expect.soft) let remaining assertions run after a failure — useful for form validation checks.

section.title: Fixtures for Auth
section.p: Extend test with fixtures: base.extend({ authenticatedPage: async ({ browser }, use) => { ... } }) to provide pre-authenticated page objects without per-test login.

section.title: Page Object Model
section.p: Extract page classes for complex flows: class LoginPage { constructor(page) {...} async login(user, pass) {...} }. Use locator constants as class properties. This separates selector management from test logic.

rule.statement: In Page Objects, store locators as class properties using page.getByRole/Label, not CSS strings. Locator objects update lazily — they're re-evaluated on each action.
rule.rationale: Locator objects created at page load time are not stale references; they re-query on use. CSS strings stored as class properties are not locators — they're just strings and need repeated calls to page.locator().

section.title: Advanced Patterns
section.p: Dialog: page.on('dialog', dialog => dialog.accept()) before triggering the dialog.
Download: const dl = page.waitForEvent('download'); await page.click('#download'); const path = await (await dl).path();

section.title: Trace and Screenshot Config
section.p: CI recommended: trace: 'on-first-retry', screenshot: 'only-on-failure'. This captures diagnostics only when tests fail, keeping artifact size manageable.
Visual regression: set expect.toHaveScreenshot.maxDiffPixelRatio >= 0.01 to absorb font rendering noise across platforms.

rule.statement: Run npx playwright install --with-deps in CI. Missing system libraries are the #1 cause of Playwright CI failures on fresh runners.
rule.rationale: Playwright requires OS-level browser dependencies. GitHub Actions and other fresh runners don't include these; the action/step silently exits or reports cryptic errors if --with-deps is omitted.
